resources.title: Scoping studies: towards a methodological framework
resources.description: This paper by Arksey and O'Malley (2005) is a foundational guide for conducting scoping studies, outlining a systematic methodological framework that has been widely adopted and adapted in various fields. It provides a clear, step-by-step approach to mapping existing literature.

resources.title: Scoping studies: advancing the methodology
resources.description: This paper by Levac et al. (2010) builds upon the foundational framework of Arksey and O'Malley (2005), offering enhancements and clarifications to the methodology of scoping studies. It provides practical guidance for researchers to conduct more rigorous and transparent scoping reviews.

resources.title: Updated methodological guidance for the conduct of JBI scoping reviews
resources.description: This paper by Peters et al. (2020) provides updated methodological guidance for conducting scoping reviews within the Joanna Briggs Institute (JBI) framework. It focuses on new updates to the approach, offering comprehensive instructions for researchers.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: reinforcing and advancing the methodology and reporting standards
resources.description: This paper by Peters et al. (2021) reinforces and advances the methodology and reporting standards for scoping reviews. It provides an update on ongoing work to enhance the conduct and reporting of scoping reviews, contributing to their rigor and transparency.

resources.title: Systematic review or scoping review? Guidance for authors when choosing between a systematic or scoping review approach
resources.description: This paper by Munn et al. (2018) provides essential guidance for researchers on distinguishing between systematic reviews and scoping reviews. It clarifies the indications for each review type, helping authors choose the most appropriate methodology for their research question.

resources.title: A scoping review of scoping reviews: advancing the approach and enhancing the consistency
resources.description: This paper by Pham et al. (2014) is a scoping review of existing scoping reviews, aiming to advance the approach and enhance consistency in their conduct and reporting. It provides valuable insights into the evolution and application of scoping review methodology.

resources.title: Recommendations for the extraction, analysis, and presentation of results in scoping reviews
resources.description: This paper by Pollock et al. (2023) provides recommendations for the extraction, analysis, and presentation of results in scoping reviews. It expands on existing JBI scoping review guidance, clarifying the process of extracting and analyzing data from various sources.

resources.title: Steps for Conducting a Scoping Review
resources.description: This paper by Mak and Thomas (2022) outlines practical steps for conducting a scoping review. It serves as a valuable guide for researchers, offering a clear and concise overview of the process from initiation to reporting.

resources.title: A typology of reviews: an analysis of 14 review types and associated methodologies
resources.description: This paper by Grant and Booth (2009) provides a comprehensive typology of reviews, analyzing 14 different review types and their associated methodologies. It helps researchers understand the diverse landscape of evidence synthesis and choose appropriate review methods.

resources.title: Enhancing the scoping study methodology: a large, inter-professional team's experience with Arksey and O'Malley's framework
resources.description: This paper by Daudt et al. (2013) discusses their experience using and enhancing the Arksey and O'Malley framework for scoping studies. It offers insights into the practical application of the methodology by a large, inter-professional team.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: time for clarity in definition, methods, and reporting
resources.description: This paper by Colquhoun et al. (2014) addresses the need for clarity in the definition, methods, and reporting of scoping reviews. It proposes recommendations to standardize terminology and methodology, contributing to the rigor and consistency of scoping review conduct.

resources.title: 10. Scoping reviews - JBI Manual for Evidence Synthesis
resources.description: This chapter from the JBI Manual for Evidence Synthesis provides comprehensive guidance on conducting scoping reviews, outlining the methodology, and incorporating updates from the JBI Scoping Review Methodology Group. It serves as a key resource for researchers following JBI methodologies.

resources.title: Protocol Development for Scoping Reviews (eBook)
resources.description: This eBook from Covidence provides guidance on developing robust protocols for scoping reviews. It covers key sections of a protocol, offering definitions, advice, and real-world examples to help researchers build a strong foundation for their reviews.

resources.title: PRISMA Extension for Scoping Reviews (PRISMA-ScR): Checklist and Explanation
resources.description: The PRISMA-ScR provides a 20-item checklist and explanation for reporting scoping reviews. It aims to improve the reporting quality of scoping reviews, ensuring transparency and completeness in published reports.

resources.title: How to conduct a scoping review? A step-by-step guide with examples & tools
resources.description: This guide provides a step-by-step approach to conducting a scoping review, covering objectives, protocol development, searching, study selection, and data charting. It offers practical advice and examples for researchers new to the methodology.

resources.title: JBI Scoping Review Workshop (General Overview)
resources.description: This workshop provides an overview of theories and concepts related to scoping reviews and other evidence synthesis methods, equipping participants with skills to plan and undertake a JBI-approach scoping review.

resources.title: A practical guide to scoping reviews: Purpose and process
resources.description: This video provides a practical guide to understanding the purpose and process of scoping reviews, helping viewers differentiate them from other review types and grasp essential steps.

resources.title: An Introduction to Scoping Reviews: Spring 2024 Webinar Series
resources.description: An introductory webinar from Spring 2024 covering key considerations for systematic review project documentation, relevant for understanding scoping reviews.

resources.title: Scoping Reviews (JBI Playlist)
resources.description: A playlist from JBI covering various aspects of scoping reviews, including short courses, evidence synthesis, and steps for conducting a scoping review.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: what they are and how you can do them (Cochrane Playlist)
resources.description: A Cochrane Training playlist providing an overview of scoping reviews, including examples and guidance on how to conduct them.

resources.title: How to extract, analyse and present data in scoping reviews
resources.description: This video offers step-by-step examples on how to effectively extract, analyze, and present data specifically within the context of scoping reviews.

resources.title: Covidence Training for Scoping and Systematic Reviews
resources.description: A training video demonstrating the use of Covidence software for both scoping and systematic reviews, providing practical guidance for efficient review management.

resources.title: How to do a Scoping Review?
resources.description: This video addresses the fundamental question of how to conduct a scoping review, offering guidance on the process and reporting based on the latest recommendations.

resources.title: How to conduct a Narrative or Scoping Literature Review
resources.description: A step-by-step guide to conducting both narrative and scoping literature reviews, including advice on finding relevant literature.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: an overview with examples
resources.description: This video provides an overview of scoping reviews as exploratory projects, demonstrating how they systematically map literature on a given topic with practical examples.

resources.title: Scoping Review Analysis Methods: Making the Right Decision
resources.description: This video clarifies common misunderstandings regarding data analysis methods in scoping reviews, guiding students and researchers to make appropriate analytical decisions.

resources.title: An Introduction and Overview of Scoping Reviews
resources.description: An introductory webinar providing a comprehensive overview of scoping reviews, highlighting their increasing application as an evidence synthesis approach.

resources.title: Steps for conducting a scoping review (JBI Methodological Guidance)
resources.description: A short video offering JBI methodological guidance for conducting scoping reviews, outlining the key steps involved in the process.

resources.title: Scoping Reviews - Systematic Reviews - LibGuides at Weill Cornell Medical College
resources.description: This LibGuide provides an overview of scoping reviews, differentiating them from systematic reviews and explaining the PCC framework for question development. It also links to key resources and guidelines.

resources.title: Intro to Scoping Reviews - University of Nebraska - Lincoln LibGuides
resources.description: This LibGuide from the University of Nebraska-Lincoln provides an introduction to scoping reviews, outlining their purpose, limitations, and key methodological frameworks like Arksey & O'Malley.

resources.title: What is a Scoping Review? - Touro College of Osteopathic Medicine LibGuides
resources.description: This LibGuide defines scoping reviews, differentiates them from systematic reviews, outlines their best uses, and discusses limitations. It also references key methodological papers and guidelines.

resources.title: Scoping Review - The Literature Review - LibGuides at Teachers College, Columbia University
resources.description: This LibGuide from Columbia University provides an overview of scoping reviews, distinguishing them from systematic reviews, and lists key resources and examples of published scoping reviews.

resources.title: Home - Scoping Reviews - LibGuides at University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
resources.description: This LibGuide from UNC Chapel Hill provides a comprehensive overview of scoping reviews, including their definition, purpose, and a simplified step-by-step process. It also highlights the role of librarians and offers additional resources.

resources.title: Scoping studies: Towards a methodological framework (Arksey, H., & O’Malley, L. 2005)
resources.description: The seminal paper by Arksey and O’Malley (2005) that introduced a methodological framework for scoping studies, which is foundational to current scoping review practices.

resources.title: PRISMA Scoping Review Guidelines
resources.description: The PRISMA extension for scoping reviews (PRISMA-ScR), published in 2018, provides a 20-item checklist and 2 optional items for transparent and complete reporting of scoping reviews.

resources.title: Joanna Briggs Institute Reviewer's Manual, Chapter 10: Scoping Reviews (2020 version)
resources.description: Chapter 10 (or 11 in some versions) of the JBI Manual for Evidence Synthesis provides detailed and updated methodological guidance for conducting scoping reviews.

resources.title: Understanding scoping reviews: Definition, purpose, and process (Peterson, F. et al. 2017)
resources.description: This paper clarifies the definition, purpose, and process of scoping reviews, offering a clear understanding for researchers and practitioners.

resources.title: Covidence - Systematic Review Management Software
resources.description: Covidence is a leading online tool designed to streamline the systematic and scoping review process, offering features for screening, data extraction, and quality assessment to save time and effort.

resources.title: Rayyan - AI-Powered Systematic Review Management Platform
resources.description: Rayyan is an AI-powered platform that streamlines the systematic and scoping review process with features like AI screening, deduplication, and PICO framework support, significantly reducing review time.

resources.title: JBI SUMARI - Systematic Review Management Software
resources.description: JBI SUMARI is a web-based platform that supports the entire systematic review process, from protocol development to report, including team management, study screening, risk of bias assessment, and data extraction.

resources.title: NVivo - Qualitative Data Analysis Software
resources.description: NVivo is a qualitative data analysis software that assists researchers in organizing, analyzing, and finding insights in unstructured data, making it useful for the synthesis phase of scoping reviews, particularly for qualitative data.

resources.title: ATLAS.ti - Qualitative Data Analysis Software
resources.description: ATLAS.ti is a qualitative data analysis software that helps researchers analyze textual, graphical, and audio-visual data. It is useful for managing and synthesizing qualitative data in scoping reviews.

resources.title: Zotero - Free Reference Management Software
resources.description: Zotero is a free, open-source reference management tool that helps researchers collect, organize, cite, and share research. It is highly useful for managing citations in scoping reviews.

resources.title: EndNote - Reference Management Software
resources.description: EndNote is a commercial reference management software that helps researchers organize citations, create bibliographies, and manage references for systematic and scoping reviews.

resources.title: ResearchGate - Scoping Review Discussions
resources.description: ResearchGate provides a platform for researchers to discuss and share papers related to scoping reviews, offering a community for questions, answers, and collaboration.

resources.title: Twitter/X - #Scopingreview Community
resources.description: The #Scopingreview hashtag on Twitter/X serves as a dynamic online community where researchers share updates, discussions, and resources related to scoping reviews.

resources.title: JBI Scoping Review Network
resources.description: The JBI Scoping Review Network provides a platform for individuals interested in JBI methodology for scoping reviews, offering resources, training, and a community for engagement.

resources.title: Systematic review or scoping review? Guidance for authors when choosing between a systematic or scoping review approach (Munn Z et al. 2018)
resources.description: This article provides guidance for authors on distinguishing between systematic and scoping reviews, addressing a key debate in evidence synthesis and helping researchers choose the appropriate methodology.

resources.title: Scoping + Systematic Reviews: Should I Assess the Quality of Included Studies?
resources.description: This resource addresses the debate around quality appraisal in scoping reviews, clarifying that it is optional for scoping reviews unlike systematic reviews.

resources.title: Comparison between Arksey and O'Malley, Levac and JBI scoping review guidelines
resources.description: This resource provides a comparative analysis of different scoping review guidelines, specifically Arksey and O'Malley, Levac, and JBI, highlighting the nuances and differences in their methodological approaches.

resources.title: From Arksey and O'Malley and Beyond: Customizations to enhance scoping review methodology (Levac D et al. 2021)
resources.description: This paper discusses the evolution of scoping review methodology from the foundational Arksey and O'Malley framework, proposing customizations to enhance its application.

resources.title: Conducting high quality scoping reviews-challenges and solutions
resources.description: This article explores challenges and solutions in conducting high-quality scoping reviews, addressing methodological debates and areas for improvement in the field.

resources.title: PRISMA-ScR-Fillable-Checklist.pdf
resources.description: This is the fillable PDF version of the PRISMA-ScR checklist, provided by the EQUATOR Network. It allows researchers to systematically document their adherence to the PRISMA-ScR reporting guidelines for scoping reviews.

resources.title: PRISMA-ScR-Fillable-Checklist-1.docx
resources.description: This is the fillable DOCX version of the PRISMA-ScR checklist, provided by the EQUATOR Network. It offers an editable format for researchers to complete the PRISMA-ScR reporting guidelines for scoping reviews.

resources.title: Updated methodological guidance for the conduct of scoping reviews
resources.description: This paper describes the updated methodological guidance from JBI for conducting scoping reviews, focusing on new updates to the approach. It provides comprehensive guidance for authors and aligns with PRISMA-ScR for consistent reporting.

resources.title: CADTH Peer Review Checklist for Search Strategies
resources.description: This open-access checklist from CADTH is designed to facilitate the peer review of electronic search strategies for systematic reviews and other evidence syntheses. It helps ensure the quality and comprehensiveness of literature searches.

resources.title: Welcome to Registrations & Preregistrations! (OSF Help Guide)
resources.description: This OSF help guide provides an overview of registrations and preregistrations on the Open Science Framework, including information on templates available for systematic reviews and scoping reviews.

resources.title: Scoping Review Protocol Template (OSF)
resources.description: This OSF project page provides a downloadable Scoping Review Protocol Template in PDF format, offering a structured framework for developing and registering a scoping review protocol.

resources.title: PROSPERO: International prospective register of systematic reviews (FAQ)
resources.description: PROSPERO is an international systematic review registry. Their guidance clarifies that scoping reviews, literature reviews, or mapping reviews are not eligible for registration, emphasizing the distinction between systematic reviews and other review types.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: what they are and how you can do them (Cochrane Training)
resources.description: This Cochrane training resource provides an overview of scoping reviews, including their definition, examples, process steps, and methods. It's a good starting point for understanding scoping review methodology within the Cochrane context.

resources.title: Evidence synthesis for health policy and systems: a methods guide (WHO)
resources.description: This WHO guide provides a rationale for synthesizing evidence from health policy and systems research (HPSR) to support health policy-making and health systems strengthening. It examines various synthesis methods, including quantitative, qualitative, and mixed methods.

resources.title: Guide to qualitative evidence synthesis: evidence-informed policy-making using research in the EVIPNET framework (WHO)
resources.description: This guide from the WHO Regional Office for Europe supports efforts to generate evidence, including qualitative evidence, for evidence-informed policy-making. It summarizes what a qualitative evidence synthesis is and provides guidance for its use.

resources.title: Scoping Review Guide - BeckerGuides at Becker Medical Library
resources.description: This library guide from Becker Medical Library provides an overview of scoping reviews, including their purpose and how they can be used to determine the scope or coverage of literature on a given topic.

resources.title: Scoping Reviews (ScRs): Guidelines and Standards (KUMC Library)
resources.description: This guide from KUMC Library familiarizes users with essential guidelines and standards for conducting and reporting scoping reviews, providing a comprehensive resource for researchers in medical fields.

resources.title: Steps for Conducting a Scoping Review (PMC)
resources.description: This article outlines the key steps for conducting a scoping review, from identifying the research question to charting and synthesizing data. It serves as a practical guide for researchers undertaking scoping reviews.

resources.title: Standards & Guidelines for a Scoping Review (Stony Brook University Library)
resources.description: This guide from Stony Brook University Library provides comprehensive information on preparing for and conducting a scoping review, covering essential standards and guidelines relevant to medical research.

resources.title: Scoping Review - Literature Reviews in the Health Sciences (University of Houston Libraries)
resources.description: This guide defines a scoping review as a form of knowledge synthesis that incorporates various study designs to summarize and synthesize literature on a given topic in health sciences.

resources.title: A scoping review on the conduct and reporting of scoping reviews
resources.description: This seminal scoping review by Tricco et al. (2016) examines the conduct and reporting of scoping reviews, highlighting inconsistencies and the need for standardized guidelines. It provides a comprehensive overview of existing methods and reporting practices, making it an essential resource for understanding the methodological landscape of scoping reviews.

resources.title: Who is at the centre of what? A scoping review of the conceptualisation of ‘centredness’ in healthcare
resources.description: This scoping review by Sturgiss et al. (2022) explores the conceptualization of 'centredness' in healthcare literature, identifying core elements and highlighting the consistent understanding of the concept across various contexts. It serves as a good example of a scoping review in a medical journal.

resources.title: Impact of COVID-19 pandemic on utilisation of healthcare services: a systematic review
resources.description: This systematic review by Moynihan et al. (2021) investigates the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on healthcare service utilization. While a systematic review, it serves as a highly cited exemplar in a medical journal, demonstrating rigorous methodology relevant to scoping review principles.

resources.title: Livelihood implications of dietary shifts to animal-source food alternatives: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review by Nordhagen et al. (2026) examines the livelihood implications of dietary shifts to animal-source food alternatives. It is an example of a recent scoping review published in a high-impact medical journal.

resources.title: Mapping conflict of interests: scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review by Chimonas et al. (2021) maps the extensive network of medical product industry ties within the healthcare ecosystem. It highlights the need for enhanced oversight and transparency to protect patient care from commercial influence, serving as a relevant exemplar in health policy.

resources.title: Scoping reviews in medical education: A scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review by Maggio et al. (2021) characterizes the nature of medical education scoping reviews, identifying areas for improvement and highlighting future research opportunities. It serves as a valuable exemplar for scoping reviews within the medical education domain.

resources.title: Step 2 - Create the Search Strategy - Scoping Review Guide
resources.description: This guide from Stony Brook University Libraries provides detailed instructions on creating a search strategy for scoping reviews, emphasizing the use of both subject headings (MeSH) and keywords, and the iterative nature of the search process. It also mentions the use of a Concept Table.

resources.title: Run your search in Ovid Medline - Scoping Reviews
resources.description: This guide from Ontario Tech University Library provides a step-by-step approach to developing search strategies in Ovid Medline, emphasizing the combination of MeSH terms and keywords, and the iterative nature of the search process. It also provides tutorials and discusses limiters.

resources.title: Searching Embase - Topic: Systematic Searching for Evidence Synthesis
resources.description: This guide from UConn Library provides detailed information on searching Embase for systematic reviews, including the use of Emtree controlled vocabulary, truncation, wildcards, and phrase/proximity searching. It highlights Embase's strengths for drug and medical device research.

resources.title: Optimal CINAHL Search Strategies for Identifying Therapy Studies and Review Articles
resources.description: This article by Wong et al. (2006) presents optimal search strategies for locating sound therapy studies and review articles in CINAHL, providing valuable insights for advanced searchers in nursing and related fields.

resources.title: Chapter 4: Searching for and selecting studies | Cochrane Handbook for Systematic Reviews of Interventions
resources.description: This chapter from the Cochrane Handbook provides comprehensive guidance on searching for and selecting studies for systematic reviews, including details on bibliographic databases, search strategies, controlled vocabulary, and text words. It emphasizes high sensitivity and the role of information specialists.

resources.title: JBI Scoping Review Workshop
resources.description: This two-day online workshop from JBI provides practical skills to design, conduct, and present rigorous scoping reviews. It covers the purpose, value, methodological features, and comparison with other evidence synthesis types.

resources.title: #AskJBI - What are the different types of systematic reviews?
resources.description: This video from JBI addresses the different types of systematic reviews, which can help in understanding the context and purpose of scoping reviews within the broader landscape of evidence synthesis.

resources.title: Systematic reviews of prevalence: challenges and future steps
resources.description: This JBI video discusses the challenges and future steps in systematic reviews of prevalence, which can be relevant for those conducting scoping reviews that involve prevalence data.

resources.title: Introducing JBI Best Practice
resources.description: This video introduces JBI Best Practice, which includes resources like the JBI Scoping Review Summary. It provides an overview of JBI's approach to evidence-based healthcare.

resources.title: How to get started with a scoping review - Covidence Blog
resources.description: This blog post from Covidence provides an introduction to scoping reviews, their purpose, and how Covidence can be used to streamline the process. It highlights the differences between systematic and scoping reviews and the importance of transparent methods.

resources.title: Scoping review of digital mental health interventions for common mental disorders in adolescents and young adults
resources.description: This scoping review maps the current evidence on digital mental health interventions for common mental disorders in adolescents and young adults, identifying intervention types, target populations, and outcomes.

resources.title: Scoping review of mental health interventions for adolescents and young adults with chronic physical conditions
resources.description: This scoping review identifies and maps mental health interventions for adolescents and young adults with chronic physical conditions, highlighting the types of interventions available and their effectiveness.

resources.title: Mental health of physicians and physicians-in-training in North America
resources.description: This scoping review summarizes existing literature on mental health of physicians and physicians-in-training, exploring types of concerns, prevalence, causes, effects, interventions, and barriers to care. It aims to improve understanding and identify research gaps.

resources.title: Doing a Scoping Review: A Practical, Step-by-Step Guide
resources.description: This practical, step-by-step guide outlines the process of conducting a scoping review, from formulating research questions to charting data, providing a foundational understanding for researchers.

resources.title: Cognitive biases in internal medicine: a scoping review.
resources.description: This scoping review explores cognitive biases in internal medicine, examining their prevalence, influence on patient outcomes, and potential debiasing strategies.

resources.title: A scoping review of medical practice variation research within the informatics literature
resources.description: This scoping review examines medical practice variation research within informatics literature, focusing on detecting MPV, especially in treatments and guideline adherence, and highlights the need for more research on causes and learning from variation.

resources.title: EMR Precharting Efficiency in Internal Medicine: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review explores existing scholarly and grey literature on precharting and EMR navigation education for medical students in Internal Medicine, aiming to summarize current practices and identify areas for improvement.

resources.title: The Isolated Surgeon: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review examines the literature on isolated surgeons, covering 25 years of research on US civilian and military surgeons operating in settings with limited professional and material support.

resources.title: A scoping review of assessment methods of competence of general surgical trainees
resources.description: This scoping review identifies and evaluates various assessment methods for competence in general surgical trainees, highlighting those with stronger supporting evidence like OSATS, PBAs, and Entrustability Scales.

resources.title: Wellness interventions in surgery: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review identifies trends in wellness interventions for surgeons and surgical trainees, with general surgery being represented in most studies. Interventions focused on ergonomics, mindfulness, stress reduction, and work hours.

resources.title: Guidance for conducting systematic scoping reviews
resources.description: This article provides guidance on conducting systematic scoping reviews, differentiating them from systematic reviews and explaining their utility, which is applicable across medical specialties including general surgery.

resources.title: Scoping Review of Pediatric Primary Care Educational Literature
resources.description: This scoping review identifies current research on pediatric primary care education for medical students and residents, providing insights into educational gaps and effective teaching strategies.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Patient Safety Checklists in Pediatrics
resources.description: This scoping review highlights the widespread use of patient safety checklists across various pediatric care settings and emphasizes their value in improving patient safety outcomes.

resources.title: Scoping review of evidence-based practice guidelines for the assessment and care of children aged 0–5 years at risk of developmental delay in low-income and middle-income country settings: evidence for action
resources.description: This scoping review summarizes recent evidence-based practice guidelines for assessing and caring for young children (0-5 years) at risk of developmental delay in low- and middle-income countries, providing crucial evidence for action.

resources.title: Conducting and Appraising Systematic and Scoping Reviews
resources.description: This resource provides guidance on conducting and appraising systematic and scoping reviews, highlighting their unique value in pediatric research due to ethical and financial constraints. It helps researchers select appropriate methodologies.

resources.title: Global emergency medicine: A scoping review of the literature from 2023
resources.description: This scoping review, the 18th edition of the Global Emergency Medicine Literature Review (GEMLR), identifies and synthesizes high-quality research in emergency care within resource-limited settings. It details a systematic search and screening process, offering insights into best practices for conducting comprehensive literature reviews in global emergency medicine.

resources.title: Emergency department observation units: A scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review assesses existing research on observation units in emergency departments, examining diagnoses, clinical outcomes, finances, and health system comparisons. It identifies knowledge gaps and highlights future research areas in observation medicine, following the Joanna Briggs Institute (JBI) methodology.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Current Social Emergency Medicine Research
resources.description: This scoping review explores the breadth and content of existing research in social emergency medicine, identifying potential areas for future research. It details a comprehensive PubMed search and classification of relevant publications by study design, publication site, and year.

resources.title: PRISMA Extension for Scoping Reviews (PRISMA-ScR)
resources.description: This document presents the PRISMA-ScR checklist and explanation, providing essential guidance for reporting scoping reviews. It is widely recognized and used across various medical specialties, including emergency medicine, to ensure comprehensive and transparent reporting.

resources.title: Comprehensiveness in Primary Care: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review explores how comprehensiveness in primary care is conceptualized and defined, mapping its attributes into two conceptual domains: breadth of care and approach to care. It identifies enablers of comprehensiveness and provides a valuable tool for future research, practice, and policy contexts.

resources.title: Training Needs for Rural Primary Care Practice: A Scoping Review of Resident Physician Preparation
resources.description: This scoping review identifies the primary dimensions of graduate medical education competencies for rural primary care practice settings. It highlights the limited number of recent peer-reviewed articles addressing specific training and competency needs for rural practice, emphasizing the need for further research in this area.

resources.title: Comprehensiveness in primary care: Findings from a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review examines the nature and extent of the literature on comprehensiveness in primary care, mapping current definitions and attributes. It identifies key comprehensiveness attributes and enablers, providing a structure for future decision-making and measure development in comprehensive primary care.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Obstetrics and Gynecology Curricula in Primary Care Residency Programs
resources.description: This scoping review assesses the quality of Women's Health curricula in US primary care residency programs, focusing on obstetrics and gynecology topics. It highlights the heterogeneity and deficits in current curricula, providing insights for improving OBGYN education for primary care trainees.

resources.title: Exploring patient involvement in obstetrics and gynaecology education for medical students: a scoping review protocol
resources.description: This scoping review protocol outlines a study to explore patient involvement in medical education within obstetrics and gynaecology, investigating the extent of involvement, benefits for students and participants, and ethical considerations. It aims to map available literature and identify gaps in this sensitive area.

resources.title: Telemedicine in Obstetrics and Gynecology: A Scoping Review of Enhancing Access and Outcomes in Modern Healthcare
resources.description: This scoping review synthesizes evidence on the adoption, effectiveness, barriers, and technological innovations of telemedicine in OB/GYN. It maps global applications, outcomes, and challenges, highlighting improved access to care and mental health support, while also addressing disparities and barriers.

resources.title: The Rise of Scoping Reviews in Nursing Science: Trends, Merits, and Responsible Use
resources.description: This article discusses the rise of scoping reviews in nursing science, highlighting their trends, merits, and responsible use. It provides a comprehensive overview of the methodology, its differences from systematic reviews, and the importance of reporting guidelines like JBI and PRISMA-ScR.

resources.title: Assessing advanced practicing nursing students' personal requirements in clinical placement: A scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review explores evidence on personal requirements for Advanced Practicing Nursing (APN) students in clinical placements, beyond technical skills. It identifies key themes such as engagement, relational factors, and professional growth, highlighting implicit expectations in assessment.

resources.title: Instruments for Assessing Nursing Care Quality: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review maps the range, nature, and characteristics of self-report instruments used to assess the quality of nursing care. It identifies key instruments and discusses their psychometric properties and contextual applications, highlighting the shift towards patient-centered frameworks.

resources.title: Undertaking a scoping review: A practical guide for nursing and midwifery students, clinicians, researchers, and academics
resources.description: This practical guide provides comprehensive advice for nursing and midwifery professionals on undertaking a scoping review, from initial planning to publication. It covers methodological considerations and best practices to facilitate conceptual clarity and successful completion.

resources.title: Assessing the Landscape in Medical Education Literature in Medical Oncology: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review assesses the current status of postgraduate medical oncology education and identifies areas for advancement, providing valuable guidance for future medical education research in oncology.

resources.title: Oncology clinical trials nursing: A scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review investigates the evolving role and future practice of clinical trials nurses in oncology, highlighting their fundamental contribution to the success of cancer clinical trials.

resources.title: Digital health and telehealth in cancer care: a scoping review of reviews
resources.description: This scoping review of reviews characterizes the peer-reviewed literature on digital health and telehealth interventions in cancer, highlighting trends and identifying gaps in research.

resources.title: Protocol for a scoping review of time to treatment in adults with newly diagnosed multiple myeloma
resources.description: This protocol outlines the methodology for a scoping review on time to treatment in multiple myeloma, providing a practical example of how to conduct a scoping review in oncology using JBI methodology and PRISMA-ScR reporting standards.

resources.title: Scoping Review: Innovations in Clinical Neurology Education
resources.description: This scoping review surveys educational innovations in clinical neurology, identifying emerging trends and areas for improvement in neurology education. It follows PRISMA-ScR guidelines.

resources.title: Neurology Undergraduate Medical Education: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review maps the literature on undergraduate neurology medical education, providing insights into current practices and identifying areas for future research and development.

resources.title: Towards new perspectives: A scoping review and meta-synthesis to redefine brain health for multiple sclerosis
resources.description: This scoping review and meta-synthesis redefines brain health for multiple sclerosis, collating evidence and synthesizing findings on brain health definitions, outcome measures, and lifestyle elements.

resources.title: Sex differences in neurology: a scoping review protocol
resources.description: This protocol outlines the methods for a scoping review on sex and gender differences in four subspecialty areas of neurology, providing guidance on conducting such reviews.

resources.title: JBI Manual of Evidence Synthesis: Scoping Reviews (chapter 10)
resources.description: This chapter provides a comprehensive framework for conducting a scoping review, covering protocol development, search strategies, data extraction, and results presentation.

resources.title: PRISMA for Scoping Reviews (PRISMA-ScR)
resources.description: An evidence-based minimum set of items for reporting in published scoping reviews, guiding authors, peer reviewers, and editors.

resources.title: MUSC Libraries: Scoping Reviews: Best Practices & Reporting
resources.description: This guide provides a detailed overview of scoping review methodologies, including best practices, reporting standards, and key resources to support the review process.

resources.title: Covidence: The Ultimate Guide to Scoping Reviews
resources.description: This comprehensive guide from Covidence offers a step-by-step approach to conducting scoping reviews, from protocol development to manuscript writing, with practical tips and resources.

resources.title: A scoping review to identify competencies for transcatheter cardiovascular procedures
resources.description: This scoping review identifies an evidence-based set of competencies to facilitate the teaching of transcatheter cardiovascular procedures, crucial for cardiac surgeons and trainees.

resources.title: Use of Videos by Health Care Professionals for Procedure Support in Acute Cardiac Care: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review explores the use of videos by healthcare professionals for procedure support in acute cardiac care, identifying current practices and areas for future development.

resources.title: Challenging the status quo: a scoping review of value-based care models in cardiology and electrophysiology
resources.description: This scoping review provides an overview of current literature on the implementation of value-based healthcare models in cardiology, with a focus on cardiac electrophysiology.

resources.title: Artificial intelligence in orthopaedics: A scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review identifies and characterizes research in artificial intelligence within orthopaedics, exploring its extent, range, and nature to inform future work.

resources.title: Outcomes of orthopaedic surgery in Ehlers-Danlos syndromes: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review evaluates the evidence and outcomes for orthopaedic surgery specifically for patients with Ehlers-Danlos syndromes, highlighting the need for more research.

resources.title: Surgical approaches, choice and positioning of implants in the surgical treatment of proximal tibia fractures in adults: a scoping review protocol
resources.description: This scoping review protocol aims to map the current evidence on surgical fixation methods for proximal tibia fractures in adults, assessing study types and identifying knowledge gaps.

resources.title: Enhancing research methods: The role of systematic and scoping reviews in orthopaedics, sports medicine and rehabilitation
resources.description: This article discusses the role and methodology of systematic and scoping reviews in orthopaedics, sports medicine, and rehabilitation, providing guidance on their application.

resources.title: Scoping Reviews - MedEd Scholarship Toolkit
resources.description: A library guide from Hackensack Meridian School of Medicine that provides a comprehensive overview of scoping reviews, including foundational resources, how-to articles, and good examples in medical education.

resources.title: An Introduction to Scoping Reviews
resources.description: An introductory article on scoping reviews published in the Journal of Graduate Medical Education, providing a foundational understanding of the methodology.

resources.title: Refugee Health Curriculum in Undergraduate Medical Education (UME): A Scoping Review
resources.description: An example of a scoping review focused on a specific topic within medical education, demonstrating the application of the methodology.

resources.title: A scoping review of frameworks evaluating digital health...
resources.description: A scoping review that identifies and analyzes existing frameworks for evaluating digital health interventions.

resources.title: Digital health equity frameworks and key concepts: a scoping...
resources.description: A scoping review that identifies and describes frameworks and concepts relevant to digital health equity interventions.

resources.title: A systematic scoping review of digital health technologies...
resources.description: A scoping review that compiles information concerning the evolution of digital health technologies to support primary health care.

resources.title: A Scoping Review and General User's Guide for Facilitating...
resources.description: Practical guidelines to assist clinicians and health systems in selecting and implementing eHealth programs into diabetes care.

resources.title: Online Guide for Electronic Health Evaluation Approaches
resources.description: A structured overview of existing eHealth evaluation approaches, with the aim of assisting eHealth evaluators.

resources.title: Digital health competencies for primary healthcare professionals: a scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review that examines the broad literature on essential digital health competencies for primary healthcare professionals.

resources.title: Digital health training programs for medical students: scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review that maps the landscape of digital health training programs for medical students.

resources.title: Digital health interventions to enhance prevention in primary care: scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review that explores the use of digital health interventions to enhance prevention in primary care.

resources.title: Enabling guidelines for the adoption of eHealth solutions: scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review that provides guidelines for the evaluation of eHealth solutions at different stages of implementation.

resources.title: Development and evaluation of eHealth services regarding accessibility: Scoping literature review
resources.description: A scoping review that examines the literature on the development and evaluation of eHealth services with a focus on accessibility.

resources.title: Infodemiology and infoveillance: scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review that provides an overview of the fields of infodemiology and infoveillance.

resources.title: Mobile apps for weight management: a scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review that examines the use of mobile apps for weight management.

resources.title: REVISÃO DE ESCOPO, NARRATIVA E INTEGRATIVA: QUAIS SÃO AS DIFERENÇAS?
resources.description: Escola de Enfermagem da USP

resources.title: Advancing scoping study methodology: a web-based survey and consultation of perceptions on terminology, definition and methodological steps
resources.description: This paper explores the experiences and considerations for conducting scoping studies from the perspective of academic and community partners. It aims to understand perceptions on terminology, definition, and methodological steps, and offers considerations for the conduct and reporting of scoping studies.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: reinforcing and advancing the methodology and application
resources.description: This paper provides a brief update on ongoing work to enhance and improve the conduct and reporting of scoping reviews. It discusses the difference between scoping reviews and other review types, reasons for undertaking them, and updates on methodological guidance.

resources.title: Systematic Approaches to a Successful Literature Review
resources.description: This book provides a step-by-step guide to approaching literature reviews systematically, covering concept analysis, scoping, and mapping. It includes practical tools for managing, searching, assessing, synthesizing, and writing up literature reviews.

resources.title: Writing the Literature Review: A Practical Guide
resources.description: This accessible text provides a roadmap for producing a high-quality literature review, covering searching, evaluating, analyzing, and synthesizing prior studies. It focuses on crafting different types of reviews (systematic, traditional–narrative, or hermeneutic–phenomenological) and includes pedagogical features like checklists, examples, and organizational tips.

resources.title: MeSH on Demand
resources.description: MeSH on Demand identifies Medical Subject Headings (MeSH) terms in submitted text (abstract or manuscript) and lists PubMed similar articles. It is a useful tool for developing search strategies.

resources.title: ClinCalc Sample Size Calculator
resources.description: This online calculator determines the minimum number of subjects needed for adequate study power. It uses various equations to help researchers plan studies and avoid type II errors or unnecessary costs from enrolling too many participants.

resources.title: Cochrane AI Methods Group
resources.description: A joint Methods Group between Cochrane, Campbell Collaboration, JBI, and the Collaboration for Environmental Evidence focusing on artificial intelligence (AI) and automation in evidence synthesis. It aims to spearhead methods research, define best practice, and support implementation of new methods.

resources.title: JBI Scoping Review Protocol Template
resources.description: The official JBI protocol template for scoping reviews. The guidance notes state: 'Critical appraisal of individual sources of evidence: This is generally not required for scoping reviews.' This is a key document in the debate about quality appraisal.

resources.title: Methodological quality, guidance, and tools in scoping reviews: a scoping review protocol
resources.description: A 2022 protocol by Pollock et al. for a scoping review aiming to identify and describe evidence and tools related to assessing methodological quality or risk of bias in scoping reviews.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: advancing the methodology
resources.description: A 2018 editorial by Armstrong et al. that discusses the evolution of scoping review methodology and touches upon key debates, including the role of quality assessment.

resources.title: A scoping review of the literature on the issues and challenges of scoping reviews
resources.description: A 2012 paper by Pham et al. that explores the challenges and issues in conducting scoping reviews, including the lack of a universally accepted definition and the debate around quality appraisal.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: a review of the challenges and recommendations
resources.description: This 2017 paper by Peterson et al. discusses challenges in scoping review methodology, including the lack of a standardized approach to quality assessment, and offers recommendations.

resources.title: To appraise or not to appraise? A survey of the application of quality assessment in systematic reviews of qualitative evidence
resources.description: While focused on qualitative systematic reviews, this 2012 paper by Hannes et al. provides a useful parallel, discussing the arguments for and against quality appraisal in evidence synthesis, which is relevant to the scoping review debate.

resources.title: A tale of two frameworks: a comparison of the Arksey and O'Malley and Joanna Briggs Institute approaches to scoping reviews
resources.description: A 2022 paper by Soyiri et al. that directly compares the Arksey & O'Malley framework with the JBI framework, highlighting differences in their approaches, including their stance on critical appraisal.

resources.title: Do we need to appraise the quality of primary studies in a scoping review? A case study
resources.description: A 2020 conference paper by Bragge that uses a case study to explore the arguments for and against conducting quality appraisal in scoping reviews.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: a third type of review?
resources.description: A 2014 editorial by Grant that discusses the place of scoping reviews in the evidence synthesis landscape and touches on the debate about their methodological rigor, including the role of quality appraisal.

resources.title: Scoping reviews: what they are and how you can do them
resources.description: A 2020 Cochrane editorial that provides an overview of scoping reviews and discusses some of the methodological considerations, including the optional nature of quality appraisal.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Scoping Reviews: A Methodological Overview
resources.description: A 2015 meta-review by Pham et al. that analyzes the state of scoping review methodology, highlighting inconsistencies in practice, including the conduct of quality appraisal.

resources.title: Scoping reviews, still unclear on the purpose: a scoping review of scoping reviews
resources.description: A 2019 paper by Munn et al. that reviews existing scoping reviews to assess how they are being conducted and reported, touching on the confusion around methodological steps like quality appraisal.

resources.title: Meeting the review family: a guide to the array of systematic review types
resources.description: A 2018 paper by Grant & Booth that provides a taxonomy of review types, helping to situate scoping reviews and clarify their purpose relative to other synthesis methods, which is central to the debate about their 'rigor'.

resources.title: What is a scoping review?
resources.description: A 2018 editorial by Colquhoun et al. that discusses the definition and purpose of scoping reviews, contributing to the ongoing conversation about what constitutes a scoping review and whether they are 'real research'.

resources.title: A scoping review of feedback features during clinical education for anaesthesia trainees
resources.description: This scoping review provides an overview of evidence on feedback for clinical education in anaesthesia, identifying opportunities for systematic review. It covers various feedback contexts and technologies used to facilitate feedback conversations.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of the Mechanisms Underlying Developmental Anesthetic Neurotoxicity
resources.description: This scoping review synthesizes evidence from preclinical studies on mechanisms of toxicity and relates findings to clinical trials in real-world settings, focusing on developmental anesthetic neurotoxicity.

resources.title: Use of Large Language Models on Radiology Reports: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review examines the current and emerging uses of Large Language Models (LLMs) on radiology text, focusing on report generation, structured data extraction, workflow optimization, and clinical decision support.

resources.title: Community and school-based dermatology education interventions delivered by medical students: A scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review examines medical student–led dermatology education and curriculum delivery for the community, analyzing existing evidence on the effectiveness of such interventions and informing future research directions.

resources.title: Shared Decision-making in Dermatology : A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review examines the use of shared decision-making in dermatology, identifying its benefits, barriers, and available tools. It highlights the importance of SDM for patient-centered care and suggests areas for further research.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Frailty and Digital Health Interventions in Older Adults
resources.description: This scoping review explores the intersection of frailty and digital health interventions in older adults, identifying current trends, gaps, and future research directions.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of the Impact of Social Isolation and Loneliness on Health Outcomes in Older Adults
resources.description: This scoping review investigates the health impacts of social isolation and loneliness in older adults, synthesizing evidence on various health outcomes and identifying intervention strategies.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of End-of-Life Communication in International Palliative Care Guidelines for Acute Care Settings
resources.description: This scoping review explores existing guidelines on palliative care to enhance understanding of end-of-life communication processes applicable to the acute care setting, identifying themes and recommendations across various countries.

resources.title: The implementation of guidelines in palliative care – a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review systematically analyzes international literature on the implementation of palliative care guidelines, evaluating factors that support or hinder their adoption globally.

resources.title: A scoping review of the feasibility, acceptability, and effects of physiotherapy delivered remotely
resources.description: This scoping review examines the feasibility, acceptability, and effects of remotely delivered physiotherapy, finding it safe, effective, and comparable to in-person care at lower cost.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Health Equity Interventions in Governmental Public Health
resources.description: This scoping review provides an evidence map of health equity interventions in collaboration with public health agencies, identifying gaps and priority areas for future research.

resources.title: What is public health? a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review identifies and reviews available public health definitions, highlighting the need for updated definitions to address current public health challenges.

resources.title: Protocol for a scoping review of sepsis epidemiology
resources.description: A protocol for a scoping review that aims to identify knowledge gaps by systematically investigating the incidence of sepsis.

resources.title: A scoping review finds that guides to authors of protocols for observational epidemiological studies varied highly in format and content
resources.description: This scoping review identifies, characterizes, and explores author guides on the role, format, and content of protocols for observational epidemiological studies.

resources.title: The epidemiology of competence: protocol for a scoping review
resources.description: Outlines a scoping review examining literature on risks and supports to clinical competence, focusing on epidemiological aspects.

resources.title: A scoping review establishes need for consensus guidance on reporting health equity in observational studies
resources.description: This scoping review highlights the need for consensus guidance on reporting health equity in observational studies, with a focus on epidemiological research.

resources.title: A scoping review to identify and describe the characteristics of theories, models and frameworks of health research partnerships
resources.description: A scoping review identifying and describing characteristics of theories, models, and frameworks relevant to health research partnerships, applicable to epidemiological studies.

resources.title: The epidemiology of childhood psoriasis: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review maps the existing literature on the epidemiology of childhood psoriasis.

resources.title: Meta-epidemiology and reporting characteristics of mapping reviews: a scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review examining meta-epidemiology and reporting characteristics of mapping reviews.

resources.title: Epidemiology and reporting characteristics of systematic reviews of clinical prediction models: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review explores the epidemiology and reporting characteristics of systematic reviews of clinical prediction models.

resources.title: Epidemiology, causes, clinical manifestation and diagnosis, prevention and control of coronavirus disease (COVID-19) during the early outbreak period: a scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review analyzing research articles on the epidemiology, causes, clinical manifestation, diagnosis, prevention, and control of COVID-19.

resources.title: Trends of infodemiology studies: a scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review examining trends in infodemiology studies, which are relevant to epidemiological research.

resources.title: Scoping review of the role of pharmacometrics in model-informed drug development
resources.description: This scoping review examines the role of pharmacometrics in model-informed drug development, highlighting its application in rare diseases and pediatric conditions.

resources.title: Pharmacist-led medication reviews: A scoping review of systematic reviews
resources.description: This scoping review explores the extent and range of systematic reviews on medication reviews conducted by pharmacists.

resources.title: Medication reviews in community pharmacy: a scoping review of publicly funded services in Canada
resources.description: This scoping review systematically maps the empirical evidence on publicly funded medication reviews provided by community pharmacists in Canada.

resources.title: Practical guide to undertaking scoping reviews for pharmacy clinicians, researchers and policymakers
resources.description: This paper provides a practical guide on how to undertake scoping reviews from inception to publication, with specific examples relevant to pharmacy topics.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Calls to Action in Pharmacy Education
resources.description: This scoping review characterizes calls to action in pharmacy education and examines traits of published literature in this area.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of the Quality and the Design of Evaluations of Pharmacy Interventions
resources.description: This scoping review examines the quality and design of studies evaluating pharmacy interventions published in peer-reviewed journals.

resources.title: MyDispense simulation in pharmacy education: a scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review analyzing the use of MyDispense simulation in pharmacy education, identifying key findings and implications.

resources.title: The role of active learning methods in teaching pharmaceutical care–Scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review investigates the role of active learning methods in teaching pharmaceutical care, aligning with the definition of a scoping review.

resources.title: Educational interventions for medical students to improve Pharmacological knowledge and prescribing skills: A scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review exploring educational interventions for medical students to enhance pharmacological knowledge and prescribing skills.

resources.title: A scoping review of nutrition education interventions to improve competencies, lifestyle and dietary habits of medical students and residents
resources.description: This scoping review maps current literature on nutrition education interventions and their impact on nutrition care competencies, self-efficacy, and dietary habits of medical students and residents.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Group Nutrition Education and Cooking Interventions for People with Cancer
resources.description: This scoping review suggests sufficient evidence to review participant outcomes to establish the effectiveness of group nutrition education and cooking programs for people with cancer.

resources.title: Scoping Review of Dietary Quality Indices
resources.description: This scoping review examines dietary quality indices, with common indices including Mediterranean diet scores, Alternative Healthy Eating Index, and Dietary Approaches to Stop Hypertension.

resources.title: A Realist Scoping Review of Community Nutrition Interventions in Socioeconomically Disadvantaged Populations
resources.description: This realist scoping review determines the underpinning initial program theory for how community nutrition interventions support socioeconomically disadvantaged populations.

resources.title: Scoping review of the association of plant-based diet quality with health outcomes
resources.description: This scoping review investigates the association of plant-based dietary patterns with health outcomes, considering nutritional value.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Tools to Assess Diet in Children and Adolescents with Autism Spectrum Disorder
resources.description: This scoping review describes the most widely used tools to assess diet in children and adolescents with Autism Spectrum Disorder.

resources.title: Nutritional and health impacts of alternative animal source foods: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review systematically evaluates studies comparing the nutritional quality and health impacts of alternative animal source foods.

resources.title: A scoping review of approaches used to develop plant-based diet quality indices
resources.description: This scoping review synthesizes literature on plant-based diet quality indices, examining their basis for development and scoring methodology.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Methodologies Exploring Diet and Health during Lactation
resources.description: This scoping review maps diverse methodologies employed in research into maternal diet during lactation and identifies key findings.

resources.title: Unveiling Dietary Complexity: A Scoping Review and Reporting Guideline for Network Analysis in Nutrition
resources.description: This scoping review systematically maps and synthesizes studies that have applied network analysis to dietary data, and establishes reporting guidelines.

resources.title: Advances in methods for characterising dietary patterns: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review describes advances in methods for characterizing dietary patterns and their relation to health.

resources.title: Diet-Related Health Recommender Systems for Patients With Chronic Health Conditions: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review presents the state of current research on diet-related health recommender systems for patients with chronic health conditions.

resources.title: Sources and preferences for nutrition information among older adults: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review maps existing studies on the sources and preferences for nutrition information among older adults.

resources.title: Scoping review protocol on research prioritisation for preparedness and response to outbreaks of high-consequence pathogens
resources.description: A protocol for a scoping review to map published research prioritization exercises on high-consequence pathogens and provide an overview of methodologies.

resources.title: A scoping review of guidelines on reporting and assessing dynamic infectious disease modelling studies
resources.description: This scoping review identifies common themes in existing reporting and quality assessment guidance for infectious disease modeling studies.

resources.title: Scoping review of infectious disease prevention, mitigation and control measures in correctional facilities
resources.description: This scoping review aims to identify published scientific literature, regulations, guidelines, and policies about infectious disease prevention, mitigation, and control in correctional facilities.

resources.title: Diagnostic stewardship in infectious diseases: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review categorizes the use of diagnostic stewardship approaches and defines this approach by identifying common characteristics and factors.

resources.title: Scoping future outbreaks: a scoping review on the evidence available to predict future outbreaks of the Blueprint diseases
resources.description: This scoping review maps and identifies the evidence available to predict future outbreaks of Blueprint diseases.

resources.title: Public health emergency preparedness for infectious disease emergencies: a scoping review of recent evidence
resources.description: This scoping review explores recent literature on priority areas and indicators for public health emergency preparedness with a focus on infectious disease.

resources.title: African based researchers' output on models for the transmission dynamics of infectious diseases and public health interventions: A scoping review
resources.description: A scoping review of applied epidemiological models of infectious disease studies that focus on the transmission dynamics of infectious diseases and public health interventions.

resources.title: Point of care testing for infectious disease in Europe: a scoping review and survey study
resources.description: This scoping review and survey study examines point-of-care testing for infectious diseases in Europe.

resources.title: A scoping Review of tools used to assess patient Complexity in Rheumatology
resources.description: This scoping review identifies complexity measures/tools used in rheumatology to aid in planning and coordinating care.

resources.title: A scoping review of shared care models for rheumatoid arthritis
resources.description: This scoping review explores shared care models between primary and specialist care for patients with rheumatoid arthritis.

resources.title: Lay Health Worker Interventions in Rheumatology: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review collates literature on Lay Health Worker interventions for adults with Rheumatic and Musculoskeletal Diseases (RMDs).

resources.title: Scoping review on remote disease monitoring in rheumatology
resources.description: This scoping review summarizes current evidence on remote monitoring technologies (RMTs) in rheumatology, including benefits, costs, and limitations.

resources.title: Management of Rheumatoid Arthritis in Primary Care: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review collects critical issues in rheumatoid arthritis management and identifies strategies to overcome them within primary care.

resources.title: Transforming Rheumatoid Arthritis Care: A Scoping Review of the Role of Digital Health
resources.description: This review explores the role of digital health in managing rheumatoid arthritis, assessing interventions such as telemedicine.

resources.title: Shared decision making in rheumatology: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review identifies studies on shared decision-making in rheumatology, aiming to improve practices and patient outcomes.

resources.title: Electronic patient-reported outcome measures using mobile health technology in rheumatology: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review characterizes the current literature on electronic patient-reported outcome measures (ePROMs) in rheumatology using mobile health technology.

resources.title: The pitfalls and promises of scoping reviews in gastroenterology literature
resources.description: This article discusses the challenges and potential of scoping reviews within gastroenterology literature.

resources.title: Rethinking the Gastroenterology Morbidity and Mortality Conference: Insights From a Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review summarizes current approaches to Morbidity and Mortality conferences in gastroenterology and proposes key components for a new approach.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Patient Health-Related Quality of Life in Gastroenterology
resources.description: This scoping review explores patient health-related quality of life within the field of gastroenterology.

resources.title: Large Language Models in Gastroenterology: Systematic Review and Scoping Review
resources.description: This systematic and scoping review explores the emerging role of Large Language Models in gastroenterology, particularly for gastrointestinal endoscopy.

resources.title: A scoping review of best practices in home enteral tube feeding
resources.description: This scoping review examines best practices in home enteral tube feeding, relevant to gastroenterology and nursing care.

resources.title: Knowledge and education to inform evidence-based practice in gastrointestinal nursing: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review explores knowledge and education to inform evidence-based practice in gastrointestinal nursing.

resources.title: Mapping training programs for endoscopy nurses in gastroenterology: a scoping review
resources.description: This scoping review maps training programs for GI endoscopy nurses, focusing on skills and education.

resources.title: A scoping review on early inflammatory bowel disease: definitions, pathogenesis, and impact on clinical outcomes
resources.description: This scoping review analyzes evidence regarding early Crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis definitions, pathogenesis, and clinical outcomes.

resources.title: Gastrointestinal dysfunction in the critically ill: a systematic scoping review and research agenda proposed by the Section of Metabolism, Endocrinology and Nutrition
resources.description: This systematic scoping review proposes a research agenda for gastrointestinal dysfunction in critically ill patients.

resources.title: State of the Science: A Scoping Review and Gap Analysis of Online Diabetes Communities
resources.description: This scoping review maps existing research on online diabetes communities where individuals affected by diabetes interact with peers.

resources.title: A scoping review of digital solutions in diabetes outpatient care
resources.description: This study investigates the functionalities of digital solutions and their impact on Quadruple Aim outcomes in diabetes outpatient care.

resources.title: Electronic Consultations for Endocrine Conditions: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review describes models used to deliver endocrine care via e-consult, and outcomes of endocrine e-consult.

resources.title: Implementation Science and Pediatric Diabetes: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review identifies implementation science research in pediatric diabetes, reporting integration of IS theory and terminology.

resources.title: The Role of Adaptive and Innovative Trial Designs in Diabetes Research: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This scoping review systematically maps the use of adaptive and master protocol designs in interventional trials for type 1 and type 2 diabetes.

resources.title: Applications of Clinical Decision Support Systems in Diabetes Care: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This review summarizes the research landscape, clinical applications, and impact of Clinical Decision Support Systems in diabetes care.

resources.title: Measuring the Quality of Life in Diabetic Patients: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This paper offers an updated review of diabetes-specific quality of life measures in scientific literature.

resources.title: Innovations in Diabetes Device Training: A Scoping Review
resources.description: This review identifies alternatives to traditional, face-to-face training methods for diabetes devices, showing equivocal short-term clinical and user satisfaction outcomes.

resources.title: A Scoping Review of Trials Designed to Achieve Remission of Type 2 Diabetes with Lifestyle Intervention Alone
resources.description: This scoping review examines trials designed to achieve remission of type 2 diabetes with lifestyle intervention alone.

resources.title: A Scoping Review to Guide Social Work Policy-Practice for Pandemic Recovery
resources.description: This scoping review systematically scopes the literature on social work, the COVID-19 pandemic, and health policy. It identifies policy issues emerging during the pandemic that are of importance for social workers working in health and mental health.

resources.title: How to Write a Systematic and Scoping Review: A Clinician-Researcher’s Guide
resources.description: This guide outlines key considerations and practical steps to undertake both systematic and scoping reviews with methodological rigor. It differentiates between systematic and scoping reviews and provides guidance on their execution.

resources.title: Mastering the Art of Scoping Reviews: A Comprehensive Guide for Public Health and Allied Health students
resources.description: This guide provides a comprehensive overview of the key steps involved in conducting a scoping review, offering practical guidance for public health and allied health students and researchers.

resources.title: Considerations for conducting a scoping review in pharmacy education
resources.description: This methods commentary outlines the reasons for conducting a scoping review versus a systematic review for topics related to pharmacy education, providing considerations for writing a protocol and search strategies.

resources.title: OSF Generalized Systematic Review Registration Form
resources.description: A general-purpose registration form for systematic reviews across disciplines and review types, including scoping reviews. It serves as a fallback when specialized forms are unavailable.

resources.title: Scoping Review Protocol Template - FINAL.pdf
resources.description: A downloadable PDF template for writing a scoping review protocol, hosted on OSF.

resources.title: User experience and adoption of automation and AI for evidence synthesis: a scoping review protocol
resources.description: This scoping review protocol aims to explore the user experience and adoption of automation and artificial intelligence tools in evidence synthesis.

resources.title: Research Registry
resources.description: A platform for registering all types of research studies, including scoping reviews, to promote transparency and reduce bias.

resources.title: INPLASY (International Platform of Registered Systematic Review and Meta-analysis Protocols)
resources.description: An international platform for registering systematic review and meta-analysis protocols, including scoping reviews. Registration is free.

resources.title: Covidence Pricing
resources.description: Covidence offers various pricing plans: Single ($339 USD/year for one review), Package ($907 USD/year for up to 3 reviews), and Organization (contact for pricing). Free trial available for 500 records.

resources.title: JBI SUMARI Pricing
resources.description: JBI SUMARI offers individual subscriptions at $130 USD/year. For organizational subscriptions, users need to contact Wolters Kluwer Health. A 14-day free trial is also available.

resources.title: Abstrackr - Machine Learning-Powered Citation Screening for Systematic Reviews
resources.description: Abstrackr is a free, machine learning-powered tool for citation screening in systematic reviews. It offers features like team collaboration, multiple screening modes, real-time analytics, and seamless data import/export. It is suitable for scoping reviews due to its flexibility and free access.

resources.title: DistillerSR Review Software
resources.description: DistillerSR is an AI-enabled platform for automating literature-based evidence synthesis. It offers features like AI Re-Rank, Smart Evidence Extraction (SEE), AI Classifiers, configurable workflows, and standard reporting (PRISMA flow diagram).
